description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a large, flat, rust-colored metal roof and a prominent vertical chimney. The structure sits on a rectangular concrete base, with a wooden deck extending from the main living area. The front facade includes large glass panels and a sliding door, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. One side of the building displays a neatly stacked firewood storage area, while the opposite side is bordered by a solid concrete wall for privacy. The rear of the bungalow is mostly enclosed, with minimal openings, emphasizing privacy and security. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on clean lines, industrial materials, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with rust-colored metal cladding, large glass panels, and a wooden deck, set on a concrete base. Features include a vertical chimney, firewood storage, and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large rust-colored roof, glass panels, sliding door, and wooden deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the firewood storage area, wooden deck, and the vertical chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid concrete wall and minimal openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden deck, small seating elements, and the concrete privacy wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass panels
